title: [FIRRTL] Paths to memory ports not working correctly
body:
Paths to memory ports are always marked as `OMDeleted`, when I would expect them to point to a port on the lowered module.
There is the same problem with the old version of OMIR, and any annotations on memory ports.
```
FIRRTL version 3.2.0
circuit Test:
  class Node:
    output memport : Path
    propassign memport, path("OMMemberReferenceTarget:~Test|Test>memport")

  module Test:
    input clock : Clock
    input en : UInt<1>
    input data : UInt<1>
    input addr : UInt<8>
    output out : UInt<1>

    object node of Node

    smem mem : UInt<1>[8]

    infer mport memport = mem[addr], clock

    when en:
      memport <= data
    out <= memport
```
Running with `./bin/firtool ./mem.fir --repl-seq-mem -repl-seq-mem-file=/dev/null --mlir-print-ir-after-all`

1. The tracker token is properly attached by ResolvePaths
```mlir
// -----// IR Dump After ResolvePaths (firrtl-resolve-paths) //----- //
firrtl.circuit "Test" {
  firrtl.class private @Node(out %memport: !firrtl.path) {
    %0 = firrtl.path member_reference distinct[0]<>
    firrtl.propassign %memport, %0 : !firrtl.path
  }
  firrtl.module @Test(in %clock: !firrtl.clock, in %en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %data: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %addr: !firrtl.uint<8>, out %out: !firrtl.uint<1>) attributes {convention = #firrtl<convention scalarized>} {
    %0 = firrtl.object @Node(out memport: !firrtl.path)
    %mem = chirrtl.seqmem interesting_name Undefined  : !chirrtl.cmemory<uint<1>, 8>
    %memport_data, %memport_port = chirrtl.memoryport Infer %mem {annotations = [{class = "circt.tracker", id = distinct[0]<>}], name = "memport"} : (!chirrtl.cmemory<uint<1>, 8>) -> (!firrtl.uint<1>, !chirrtl.cmemoryport)
    chirrtl.memoryport.access %memport_port[%addr], %clock : !chirrtl.cmemoryport, !firrtl.uint<8>, !firrtl.clock
    firrtl.when %en : !firrtl.uint<1> {
      firrtl.strictconnect %memport_data, %data : !firrtl.uint<1>
    }
    firrtl.strictconnect %out, %memport_data : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
}
```
2. The annotation is properly moved to a port annotation in LowerCHIRRTL
```mlir
// -----// IR Dump After LowerCHIRRTLPass (firrtl-lower-chirrtl) //----- //
firrtl.module @Test(in %clock: !firrtl.clock, in %en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %data: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %addr: !firrtl.uint<8>, out %out: !firrtl.uint<1>) attributes {convention = #firrtl<convent
ion scalarized>} {
  %invalid_ui1 = firrtl.invalidvalue : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %c1_ui1 = firrtl.constant 1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %invalid_clock = firrtl.invalidvalue : !firrtl.clock
  %c0_ui1 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %invalid_ui3 = firrtl.invalidvalue : !firrtl.uint<3>
  %0 = firrtl.object @Node(out memport: !firrtl.path)
  %mem_memport = firrtl.mem Undefined {depth = 8 : i64, name = "mem", portAnnotations = [[{class = "circt.tracker", id = distinct[0]<>}]], portNames = ["memport"], readLatency = 1 : i32, write
Latency = 1 : i32} : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  %1 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[addr] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  firrtl.strictconnect %1, %invalid_ui3 : !firrtl.uint<3>
  %2 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[en] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  firrtl.strictconnect %2, %c0_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %3 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[clk] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  firrtl.strictconnect %3, %invalid_clock : !firrtl.clock
  %4 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[rdata] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  %5 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[wmode] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  firrtl.strictconnect %5, %c0_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %6 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[wdata] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  firrtl.strictconnect %6, %invalid_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %7 = firrtl.subfield %mem_memport[wmask] : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<3>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, rdata flip: uint<1>, wmode: uint<1>, wdata: uint<1>, wmask: uint<1>>
  firrtl.strictconnect %7, %invalid_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  %8 = firrtl.tail %addr, 5 : (!firrtl.uint<8>) -> !firrtl.uint<3>
  firrtl.strictconnect %1, %8 : !firrtl.uint<3>
  firrtl.strictconnect %2, %c1_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  firrtl.strictconnect %3, %clock : !firrtl.clock
  firrtl.strictconnect %7, %c0_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  firrtl.when %en : !firrtl.uint<1> {
    firrtl.strictconnect %7, %c1_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %5, %c1_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %6, %data : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
  firrtl.strictconnect %out, %4 : !firrtl.uint<1>
}
```
3. The port annotation is completely dropped by LowerMemory
```mlir
// -----// IR Dump After LowerMemory (firrtl-lower-memory) //----- //
firrtl.circuit "Test" {
  firrtl.class private @Node(out %memport: !firrtl.path) {
    %0 = firrtl.path member_reference distinct[0]<>
    firrtl.propassign %memport, %0 : !firrtl.path
  }
  firrtl.module @Test(in %clock: !firrtl.clock, in %en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %data: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %addr: !firrtl.uint<8>, out %out: !firrtl.uint<1>) attributes {convention = #firrtl<conve
ntion scalarized>} {
    %c1_ui1 = firrtl.constant 1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %0 = firrtl.object @Node(out memport: !firrtl.path)
    %mem_RW0_addr, %mem_RW0_en, %mem_RW0_clk, %mem_RW0_wmode, %mem_RW0_wdata, %mem_RW0_rdata = firrtl.instance mem @mem(in RW0_addr: !firrtl.uint<3>, in RW0_en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in RW0_clk: !firrtl.clock, in RW0_wmode: !firrtl.uint<1>, in RW0_wdata: !firrtl.uint<1>, out RW0_rdata: !firrtl.uint<1>)
    %1 = firrtl.bits %addr 2 to 0 : (!firrtl.uint<8>) -> !firrtl.uint<3>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_RW0_addr, %1 : !firrtl.uint<3>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_RW0_en, %c1_ui1 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_RW0_clk, %clock : !firrtl.clock
    %2 = firrtl.and %en, %en : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_RW0_wmode, %2 : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_RW0_wdata, %data : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %out, %mem_RW0_rdata : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
  firrtl.module private @mem(in %RW0_addr: !firrtl.uint<3>, in %RW0_en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %RW0_clk: !firrtl.clock, in %RW0_wmode: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %RW0_wdata: !firrtl.uint<1>, out %RW0_rdata: !firrtl.uint<1>) {
    %mem_ext_RW0_addr, %mem_ext_RW0_en, %mem_ext_RW0_clk, %mem_ext_RW0_wmode, %mem_ext_RW0_wdata, %mem_ext_RW0_rdata = firrtl.instance mem_ext @mem_ext(in RW0_addr: !firrtl.uint<3>, in RW0_en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in RW0_clk: !firrtl.clock, in RW0_wmode: !firrtl.uint<1>, in RW0_wdata: !firrtl.uint<1>, out RW0_rdata: !firrtl.uint<1>)
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_ext_RW0_addr, %RW0_addr : !firrtl.uint<3>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_ext_RW0_en, %RW0_en : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_ext_RW0_clk, %RW0_clk : !firrtl.clock
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_ext_RW0_wmode, %RW0_wmode : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %mem_ext_RW0_wdata, %RW0_wdata : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %RW0_rdata, %mem_ext_RW0_rdata : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
  firrtl.memmodule private @mem_ext(in RW0_addr: !firrtl.uint<3>, in RW0_en: !firrtl.uint<1>, in RW0_clk: !firrtl.clock, in RW0_wmode: !firrtl.uint<1>, in RW0_wdata: !firrtl.uint<1>, out RW0_rdata: !firrtl.uint<1>) attributes {dataWidth = 1 : ui32, depth = 8 : ui64, extraPorts = [], maskBits = 1 : ui32, numReadPorts = 0 : ui32, numReadWritePorts = 1 : ui32, numWritePorts = 0 : ui32, readLatency = 1 : ui32, writeLatency = 1 : ui32}
}
```
